title: verbesina encelioides subsp. exauriculata
intro: Verbesina encelioides subsp. exauriculata, also known as Mexican Gold or Yellow Flowering Bush, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the Americas, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Verbesina encelioides subsp. exauriculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
